## Problem or use case

What problem does this solve, or what workflow would it improve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior or API you have in mind (CLI flags, output format, performance goals, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered, if any.

## Additional context

Examples, prior art, or links to related issues.
